properties.action_jun09: Israeli Air Force struck Mahshahr petrochemical complex (first energy site since April 8 ceasefire) + dismantled restored air defenses across western/central Iran; dozens of warplanes participated; Netanyahu defied Trump's request to stop; subsequently announced halt of strikes after Trump pressure; warned will resume if Iran launches more missiles

announced halt of military offensive against Israel (minutes after Trump's 'immediate stop' call); condition: will resume if Israel strikes southern Lebanon or further aggression; formally conditions peace on Lebanon ceasefire + halt US blockade; 15 wounded (14 Mahshahr/Khuzestan, 1 Tehran) in Israeli strikes; airspace returned to normal conditions

'I made Netanyahu stop'; called for attacks to 'immediately stop'; warned Netanyahu: 'Bibi, you better be careful, or you will be on your own very soon' — most explicit threat yet of withdrawing US support; Israel was preparing 'significant attack in Tehran' when Trump called; says final peace negotiations moving forward; blockade remains until Final Deal; MBC: MOU agreed, Trump final approval pending

defied Trump by proceeding with strikes on Iran (Mahshahr petrochemical + air defenses); subsequently halted strikes after Trump pressure; warned won't hesitate to resume if Iran launches more missiles; was preparing 'significant attack in Tehran' before Trump's call redirected to Mahshahr/air defense targets
part of Iran's military apparatus involved in halt declaration; military operations halted per Iran announcement

properties.status_jun09: June reopening 'unlikely' per analysts; Fitch estimates end of July at earliest; blockade continues; Iran's three-theater linkage ties Hormuz reopening to Lebanon ceasefire

Iran formally conditions peace on Lebanon ceasefire; Iran: will resume attacks if Israel strikes southern Lebanon; every Lebanon ceasefire collapse resets diplomatic timeline for US-Iran agreement and Hormuz reopening
blockade continues per Trump statement; blockade remains until Final Deal
